name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == 
  /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
  /\ turn = 1

Next == 
  \E p \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ state[p] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
       /\ turn' = turn
    \/ /\ state[p] = "trying"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
       /\ turn' = turn
    \/ /\ state[p] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
       /\ turn' = turn + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
  /\ turn \in Int

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, participants, coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants


vars == <<participants, coordinator>>

Init == /\ coordinator = 0
        /\ participants = {}
        /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

Next == /\ coordinator = 0
        /\ participants' = participants \cup {1, 2, ..., N}
        /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

\* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating"
VARIABLES philosophers, forks

Init == /\ philosophers = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]
        /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> TRUE]  \* TRUE means fork i is free

\* Helper to get left and right fork indices for philosopher i
leftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
rightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry
Hungry(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "thinking"
            /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
            /\ UNCHANGED forks

\* Action: philosopher i picks up forks if both are free
PickUp(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "hungry"
            /\ forks[leftFork(i)] = TRUE
            /\ forks[rightFork(i)] = TRUE
            /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
            /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![leftFork(i)] = FALSE,
                                      ![rightFork(i)] = FALSE]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

\* Action: philosopher i puts down forks
PutDown(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "eating"
             /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
             /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![leftFork(i)] = TRUE,
                                   ![rightFork(i)] = TRUE]
             /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

\* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry, pick up forks if available, or put down forks
Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          (Hungry(i) \/ PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosophers, forks>>

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosophers \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

\* Safety property: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously
NoDeadlock == \A i \in 1..N:
                 philosophers[i] # "eating" \/ philosophers[leftFork(i)] # "eating"

\* Liveness property: every hungry philosopher eventually starts eating
SpecLive == Spec /\ [](<> (philosophers[i] = "eating")) \* for all i

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => flag[j] = FALSE
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num[j] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == 
    /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  \* Queue initialized with zeros
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

Next == 
    \* Producer action: enqueue if not full
    \/ /\ size < K
       /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]  \* Enqueue 1 (example value)
       /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
       /\ size' = size + 1
       /\ head' = head
    \* Consumer action: dequeue if not empty
    \/ /\ size > 0
       /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]  \* Dequeue (set to 0)
       /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
       /\ size' = size - 1
       /\ tail' = tail
    \* No-op if full or empty (blocks)
    \/ /\ size = K \/ size = 0
       /\ q' = q
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail
       /\ size' = size

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

Next == 
    \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Follower" /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
    \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Candidate" /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Leader"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
    \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Leader" /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = state
        /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
    /\ readers = {}
    /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
    \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
       /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
                           /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
                           /\ writer_active' = writer_active
    \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
       /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
                           /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
                           /\ writer_active' = TRUE
    \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
       /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
                           /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
                           /\ writer_active' = writer_active

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES token


vars == <<token>>

Init == token = 1

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store, action, key, value


vars == <<store, action, key, value>>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]
  /\ action \in {"Put", "Get"}
  /\ key \in Keys
  /\ value \in Values

Next == 
  \/ /\ action' = "Put"
     /\ key' \in Keys
     /\ value' \in Values
     /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![key'] = value']
  \/ /\ action' = "Get"
     /\ key' \in Keys
     /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]
  /\ action \in {"Put", "Get"}
  /\ key \in Keys
  /\ value \in Values

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
    /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [promised \in 1..N |-> 0, accepted \in 1..N |-> 0, value \in V : 0]]
    /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot \in 1..N |-> 0, value \in V |-> 0]]
    /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p, a, b) == 
    /\ acceptors[a][promised] <= b
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a][promised] = b]
    /\ proposers' = proposers
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p, a, b, v) == 
    /\ acceptors[a][promised] = b
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a][accepted] = b, ![a][value] = v]
    /\ proposers' = proposers
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, a, b, v) == 
    /\ acceptors[a][promised] <= b
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a][accepted] = b, ![a][value] = v]
    /\ proposers' = proposers
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Accepted(p, a, b, v) == 
    /\ acceptors[a][accepted] = b
    /\ acceptors' = acceptors
    /\ proposers' = proposers
    /\ chosen' = v

Next == 
    /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
        \/ Prepare(p, a, b)
        \/ Promise(p, a, b, v)
        \/ Accept(p, a, b, v)
        \/ Accepted(p, a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [promised \in 1..N |-> Nat, accepted \in 1..N |-> Nat, value \in V : Nat]]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot \in 1..N |-> Nat, value \in V |-> Nat]]
    /\ chosen \in V

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file = Seq(1..FILE_SIZE) \* File represented as a sequence of bytes
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks = {} \* No chunks have been sent yet
    /\ ackedChunks = {} \* No chunks have been acknowledged yet
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 0] \* No retransmissions attempted yet

SendChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ i \notin sentChunks
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

RetransmitChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks>>

ReceiveAck(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

NoAck(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[i] >= MAX_RETRIES
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, ackedChunks>>

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : SendChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : RetransmitChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : ReceiveAck(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : NoAck(i)

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks \in SUBSET 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ ackedChunks \in SUBSET 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Nat]

====
